title: 4-Pack Clear Wash & Makeup Bags TSA Approved Makeup Bags, PVC Waterproof Travel Wash Bags for Family, Men, Women (Largea, Medium, Small, Minimum)
features: 【Premium Material】Aucuu Travel Cosmetic Bag is made of clear PVC material, soft、waterproof and tear-resistant. Plus, the clear toiletry bag allows you to see and access your belongings quickly and easily
【TSA Certified】Clear Travel Cosmetic Bag strictly adheres to TSA 3-1-1 liquid regulations for all airline carry-on luggage, so you can easily pass through airport security without any worries

【Reinforced Seams】The reinforced seam design can effectively prevent the bag from cracking or reduce the leakage of liquid from the bag. The sturdy thickness makes the bag more durable and easy to clean and reusable

【Large Capacity】You will receive 4 clear wash bags of different sizes at one time. This toiletry bag can store travel bottles, makeup, perfume, shaving kits, toothpaste, combs and more, suitable for various daily activities or travel, bringing great convenience to your life

【Best Gift】We believe that Aucuu wash bag must be your best choice! Perfect for every occasion like Christmas, Birthday, Thanksgiving and Goddess' Day, this cosmetic bag is the perfect gift to say thank you to a friend、 wife、girlfriend or mother
description: Product Description Reinforced seams The reinforced seam design can effectively prevent the bag from tearing or reduce the leakage of liquid from the bag. Large capacity You will receive 3 transparent wash bags in different sizes at the same time. This toiletry bag can store travel bottles, makeup, perfume, shaving kits, toothpaste, combs and more. Premium material and waterproof Aucuu travel cosmetic bag is made of clear PVC material, soft, waterproof and tear-resistant.
